title: Better Feathers
body:
# **Better Feathers**
**Makes feathers better!**

Adds: The **Feather-man** (Just a chicken with the Feather Block texture)

**You can make copper into iron with a feather!!!**

**Reinforced Feather (sword):**

![Reinforced Feather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba27c670321e6189ff358b0dc624c9d8b4d19dff.png)

**Feather Block:**

![Feather Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8cf0d73ac097ae4e8a9f8ce951be7ab4756bd98.png)

**A new Music Disc!**

![RedYT - Feather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/620b7d1d8ae1db3a8775ea85ca853ea6b17d33c5.png)

[Song:](https://youtu.be/OVhWlD9AhFs)
